code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)

[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为边缘节点的Hub同步流程建模。核心场景是：当本地PLC逻辑检测到与联邦Hub的状态不一致时，要触发完整的同步闭环。起点应该是IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic，然后进入OUT_OF_SYNC状态。
确认一下，OUT_OF_SYNC的触发条件是本地Hub检测到CRDT帧过期、缺失贡献指标或网络拓扑变更，对吗？另外，SyncRequested事件是通过MQTT Broker发送的？
对，完全正确。BeginSync之后进入FETCH_REMOTE，这个阶段要从联邦对等节点拉取最新的CRDT向量时钟和状态差异。
已添加FETCH_REMOTE。接下来FrameDownloaded后进入MERGE状态，这里需要执行CRDT合并函数并确定性解决冲突。然后VALIDATE阶段要校验签名和哈希。
正常路径到SYNCED就结束了，但异常路径很重要。FETCH_REMOTE可能因网络超时或认证失败进入FAILED，MERGE可能遇到ConflictUnresolved，VALIDATE可能有HashMismatch。这些都要能重试。
异常路径已添加，FAILED通过RetryScheduled回到RETRY，再重新进入OUT_OF_SYNC。另外我注意到SYNCED之后应该能流向TelemetryStream？
是的，SYNCED输出到TelemetryStream。还有维护场景：周期同步或参数变更时SYNCED要回到OUT_OF_SYNC；更关键的是Hub离线或高延迟时要进入DEGRADED降级模式，最终可能上报给ActuatorController。
全部完成。核心状态OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED已用橙色高亮，异常路径和维护路径都已对齐。确认这是SM-06.01的最终状态？
